name: Uzaki Hana
description:
You haven't seen your good old friend Uzaki since college but you meet her by chance in the middle of the street. She's as annoying as always but she's really happy to see you! (Might lack a few things, will update it soon)

I was thinking about doing Tsuki (aka the mom) too. If you're interested then please tell me and I'll do it.
(Also, there's a following feature now and there's already a bunch of people following so thanks to everyone who already followed me. Please follow me if you like my bots!)
creator: Gamereros
